srcp_report.promotion_status_note: As of this entry cycle, Alex has earned 32 of 72 available Current Role points (44.4%). Promotion eligibility requires 75% of Current Role (54 pts) and 50% of Next Role (39 pts). Alex is on a solid developmental trajectory for a first-cycle report and should focus on advancing ratings across Data Extraction, Site Analytics, DOMO, and SQL skills in the next evaluation period.

skills.description_context: Advertising concepts, strategies, and terminology
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex has demonstrated a solid grasp of digital advertising terminology and key activities in data analytics. During weekly 1:1 check-ins, Alex confidently explained core digital advertising concepts including programmatic display, paid search, social advertising, and site analytics without prompting. Completed the Overview of Data Analytics training and can articulate the purpose and function of various digital advertising platforms, tools, and strategies. Accurately uses industry terminology when communicating with internal teammates and participates meaningfully in team discussions about media channels and campaign strategy.

skills.description_context: Ad Verification / DoubleVerify / Tahoe Media Lake
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex completed the 'Data Sources: Double Verify' training and demonstrated basic knowledge of ad verification calculations and methodology. Can explain how DoubleVerify is used to authenticate the quality of digital media and articulate the importance of viewability, fraud prevention, and brand safety from both a transparency and accountability perspective. Is beginning to familiarize with the DoubleVerify interface and Tahoe Media Lake under mentor guidance. Currently working toward the ability to independently refresh ad verification extracts.

skills.description_context: Campaign Manager 360 / Search Ads 360 / Tahoe Media Lake
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex completed the required Paid Media training and shows basic knowledge of Campaign Manager 360 and Search Ads 360 data structures. Understands where relevant metrics such as impressions, clicks, and conversions can be located within each platform. Currently observing the extract refresh process in the Media Lake sandbox alongside a mentor and is beginning to build familiarity with the available data. Will continue developing hands-on proficiency with direct data source pulls in the next evaluation cycle.

skills.description_context: Digital Advertising Metrics and Calculations
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex completed all Data Sources training and successfully submitted all associated homework assignments. During a recent review session, Alex accurately explained digital advertising metrics including impressions, clicks, CTR, CPM, CPC, CPV, reach, and frequency and articulated how each metric is used to measure campaign performance. Demonstrated the ability to distinguish between engagement metrics and deliverability metrics and described how data-driven decisions are made using this information. Has a strong foundation for applying these metrics across live reporting tasks.

skills.skill_category: Empower OS - File Load Management OR List Management
skills.description_context: Target List QA and Upload / Appending Variables and Records
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex completed the 'Back End HCP Database Empower Training' in Continu, successfully uploaded the training target list, and appended test variables and records without errors. Has since completed one live client target list upload with light assistance from a mentor. The file was delivered on schedule and required only minor corrections, reflecting growing accuracy in the QA and upload process. Alex is progressing well toward fully independent execution and is expected to reach Level 3 in the next cycle.

skills.skill_category: Empower OS - File Load Management OR List Management
skills.description_context: Outsourced List Matching and Buy File Export
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex reviewed both the outsourced list matching and buy file processes during the 'Back End HCP Database Empower Training' and the relevant SOPs. Can accurately explain the purpose, scope, inputs, and outputs of each process and identify where each step begins and ends. Has observed a mentor complete an outsourced list match export and a buy file dissemination request, and is beginning to participate in pull requests under supervision. Will build toward independent execution in the next cycle.

skills.skill_category: Empower OS - File Load Management OR List Management
skills.description_context: Troubleshooting Empower Issues and Target List QA
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex has demonstrated the ability to identify target list issues during QA and escalate them clearly and in a timely manner to a mentor or manager. Over the course of this cycle, Alex flagged two instances of file format errors and one field mapping discrepancy, providing a clear description of each issue and what the correct expected output should be. Is actively building the technical and communication skills necessary to begin resolving issues in collaboration with the Client or CMI team.

skills.description_context: Microsoft Office Suite Proficiency
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex demonstrates consistent and appropriate use of Microsoft Office tools across all daily work activities. Regularly uses Outlook for professional email correspondence, Teams for internal communication and meeting management, Excel for data organization and reporting tasks, and OneDrive for file sharing and storage. Has independently set up recurring team meetings, created and distributed meeting notes in OneNote, and used Word for documentation tasks. Uses the correct application for each task type and is continuing to develop advanced feature proficiency.

skills.description_context: Pivot Tables, Calculated Fields, and LOOKUP Formulas
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex completed the 'Excel for Analytics and Reporting' training and successfully finished all assigned homework. Independently creates pivot tables with filters, calculated fields, and sorts to organize and summarize reporting data for assigned accounts. Has begun applying VLOOKUP to combine data from multiple tables in monthly reporting tasks and is developing proficiency with XLookup. On track to independently use all three LOOKUP functions for reporting purposes in the next cycle.

skills.description_context: Charts, Graphs, Tables, Sorting, and Filtering
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex demonstrates solid working knowledge of Excel's analytical capabilities. Creates basic charts, tables, and graphs to support ad hoc reporting requests and uses filtering and sorting to isolate relevant data with oversight from a mentor. Has taken ownership of maintaining a client-level Excel reporting tracker, updating it on a consistent schedule and ensuring correct data entry and formatting. Demonstrates attention to detail in worksheet organization and data presentation.

skills.description_context: Basic Site Metrics Pull and Monthly Reporting
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex pulled basic site metrics including site visits, time on site, unique visits, and page views from Google Analytics during training sessions and as part of an initial report update assignment. Shows a foundational understanding of what each metric represents and how it is used in monthly performance reporting. Currently developing the consistency and independence needed to manage and update data extracts across assigned reports without guidance.

skills.description_context: Major Media Program Knowledge
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex has attended three Supplier Partner Education Sessions, covering Email programs, Programmatic Display, and Paid Search, and followed up each session with a discussion of key learnings with the manager. Is actively building a working understanding of how different media programs deliver messages to target audiences and which metrics are associated with each channel type. With continued exposure to brand media plans and internal channel team discussions, Alex will develop greater depth of program-level knowledge.

skills.skill_category: Empower OS - File Load Management OR List Management
skills.description_context: PII Confidentiality and Security Protocols
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex can accurately explain CMI/Compas security and confidentiality protocols surrounding PII, including the proper handling of target lists and data feeds. Reviewed the 'Back End HCP Database Empower Training' and demonstrated a clear understanding of compliance requirements and best practices. During this cycle, Alex correctly identified a potential confidentiality adherence misstep during a file handoff and escalated it promptly to a mentor for resolution. Continues to follow all confidentiality protocols accurately in day-to-day tasks with minimal oversight.

skills.skill_category: Empower OS - File Load Management OR List Management
skills.description_context: Target List Overlap Analysis
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex accurately described all steps required to execute a target list overlap analysis during a review session with the manager, including the process for comparing two or more target lists to identify unique results and how those findings are communicated to the planning team. Has observed a mentor complete a live overlap analysis request and understands the business purpose and expected output. Will begin fielding overlap analysis requests with mentor guidance in the next cycle.

skills.description_context: Foundational Understanding and Data Integration
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex completed the 'Intro to DOMO' training and has been consistently attending bi-weekly 'DOMO Downloads' sessions to build and reinforce foundational knowledge. Demonstrates a basic understanding of key DOMO concepts including datasets, cards, beast modes, and dashboard navigation. Currently working with a mentor to make minor updates to an existing visualization and is building toward the ability to independently create or refresh visualizations in the next cycle.

skills.description_context: Advanced Site Analytics Metrics
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex completed both the 'Data Sources: Intro to Google Analytics' and 'Data Sources: Intro to Adobe' training sessions. Has gained a foundational understanding of both advanced site analytics platforms and can identify key metrics available within each tool, including events, downloads, registrations, video views, and conversions, and articulate their relevance to business reporting. Is beginning to develop context around how this data is applied in client-specific reporting scenarios.

skills.description_context: Data Accuracy, Integrity, and QA Processes
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex demonstrates a basic understanding of data tables in Tahoe/Snowflake and the role of DOMO connectors in the reporting workflow. During this cycle, Alex assisted in investigating a data discrepancy identified in an assigned dashboard, working with a mentor to trace the issue back to the source table and verify the expected refresh schedule. Is building toward the ability to proactively identify anomalies and conduct independent QA checks on report data.

skills.description_context: Understanding and Interpreting Data Sources
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex accurately identifies the data pulled from key sources including Campaign Manager 360, DoubleVerify, and site analytics tools and has communicated basic findings from these sources to the manager during weekly review sessions. Is developing a clearer understanding of the differences between each data source and how they individually inform analytics performance. Will continue building toward the ability to articulate how all sources collectively inform business decisions and campaign optimization.

skills.description_context: Programmatic Media Knowledge and Reporting
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex completed the Programmatic Foundations course and demonstrated a basic understanding of programmatic display media, including the purpose and mechanics of demand-side platforms, ad exchanges, and audience-based targeting. Can explain key programmatic concepts such as real-time bidding and ad format types at a foundational level. Is beginning to manage and update programmatic data extracts for assigned reports under supervisor oversight and will grow toward greater independence with continued hands-on exposure.

skills.description_context: Basic SQL Querying and Data Retrieval
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex completed SQL 101 training and successfully submitted all assigned homework, demonstrating a foundational understanding of query structure, SELECT statements, and basic data filtering. Has begun running pre-made SQL scripts for monthly reporting tasks with guidance from a mentor, successfully executing queries on assigned datasets without errors. Will continue developing comfort with SQL syntax and query modification in the next cycle with a goal of running scripts with greater independence.

skills.description_context: CIA Benchmark Dashboards and Campaign Benchmarking
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex reviewed the 'Benchmark Dashboard Training' video and successfully connected to the Display, Email, Microsite, Direct Mail, and Alerts Benchmark DOMO Dashboards. Is beginning to familiarize with the available benchmarks for each media channel and how they are used to evaluate campaign performance against historical norms. Will work in partnership with the Business Insights Team to begin pulling and incorporating benchmark metrics into measurement plans in the next evaluation cycle.

skills.description_context: Professional Email Etiquette
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex writes professional emails with appropriate tone, structure, and grammar consistently across all internal and external communications. Within the first 90 days, received positive written feedback from the manager on more than five reviewed emails, covering both internal team communications and initial external vendor correspondence. Demonstrates the ability to customize email tone and structure to suit different recipients and scenarios, including follow-up outreach to publisher contacts and escalation emails to internal partners. Shows strong command of professional written communication with clear, concise messaging.

skills.description_context: App Studio Interface
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex completed the foundational training on DOMO App Studio and has gained a basic understanding of the platform's functionality and interface. Can navigate to the App Studio environment within DOMO and identify the key structural components of an existing app. Is beginning to explore how App Studio is used from both a CMI and client-specific perspective and will continue developing familiarity with filtering options and layout configurations with mentor support in the next cycle.

skills.description_context: Programming Environment Setup and Foundational Concepts
skills.rating_support_comments: Alex successfully set up all required programming environments, including R Studio for R querying and both Anaconda and Visual Studio Code for Python, with all necessary packages and add-ons installed and verified as functional. Has begun attending both the Python 101 and R 101 training sessions and is working through the initial course modules. Will complete all assigned homework in the next cycle to meet the criteria for a Level 2 rating and demonstrate basic script execution competency.
